ai.error: OPENAI_API_KEY or LLM_MODEL is not configured

All rights reserved.", "tlp": {"label": "WHITE", "url": "https://www.first.org/tlp/"}}, "lang": "en", "notes": [{"category": "summary", "text": "Security update for shibboleth-sp", "title": "Title of the patch"}, {"category": "description", "text": "This update for shibboleth-sp fixes the following issue:

- CVE-2025-9943: SQL injection in the 'ID' attribute of the SAML response when the replay cache of the Shibboleth
  Service Provider (SP) is configured to use an SQL database as storage service (bsc#1249394).
